description_long: This is a classic blue station wagon-style convertible car with a long, boxy body and a gently sloping hood. The car features a pair of round headlights at the front, a wide windshield with two wipers, and blacked-out windows that suggest a dark interior. The side profile reveals two doors and a large rear window, with simple, rounded wheel arches and black wheels. The rear of the car is flat with a single rear window and subtle red taillights on each side. The car's exterior is finished in a smooth, matte blue paint with white accents on the bumpers and mirrors. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage European estate cars, blending utilitarian form with classic automotive styling.
description: A vintage blue station wagon-style convertible car with a boxy body, round headlights, and blacked-out windows. It features white bumpers, black wheels, and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded hood, dual round headlights, wide windshield with two wipers, and white bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long, boxy body, two doors, blacked-out windows, and black wheels with white hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back, single rear window, white bumper, and red taillights on each side.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and window arrangement, black wheels, and blue body.
